message.content: {"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Focuses on veterans’ benefits/VA procedures (Title 38), specifically disability compensation evaluations for mental health conditions from military sexual trauma—coded under Defense, which includes veterans’ affairs and benefits."}
{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"Improving energy efficiency standards for appliances and equipment falls under energy policy and conservation measures."}

{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"Designates a National Heritage Area, an NPS-affiliated unit concerning federal land/cultural resource management, which falls under Public lands and water management."}

{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"Focuses on levee management and Corps of Engineers water-resource infrastructure policy, which falls under public lands and water management (flood control/water resources)."}
{"policy_number":12,"reasoning":"Primary purpose is to fund child care services; child care is classified under Social Welfare. The campus/VA context is secondary to the core child care provision."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Suspending import duties is a tariff change, which falls under foreign trade policy."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Addresses veterans’ access to medical care through VA programs; veterans’ affairs are coded under Defense."}
{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"The bill concerns oversight and accounting of financial support related to renewable energy promotion, which falls under energy policy."}

{"policy_number":13,"reasoning":"Expands the federal rehabilitation (historic building) tax credit, a tool aimed at community revitalization and development; thus the primary focus is community development/housing rather than general tax policy."}

{"policy_number":10,"reasoning":"The bill targets transportation infrastructure and operations by improving a pilot program to address long-term parking shortages for commercial motor vehicles, which falls under transportation policy."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"The bill mandates reporting/notification by an executive agency (VA) to Congress—an administrative oversight and transparency requirement—so it fits Government operations (19) rather than substantive veterans policy."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Concerns election administration and voter registration procedures, which fall under Government operations (elections and campaign processes)."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Creates a national initiative focused on autism spectrum disorder, which primarily concerns health/mental health research, services, and coordination."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Focuses on Medicare and Medicaid advisory commissions (MedPAC and MACPAC) and their governance/representation, which are core health policy programs under the Social Security Act."}

{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"Targets tax credits to incentivize fuel cell and off-highway vehicle technologies, a substantive energy policy (alternative fuels/energy efficiency) rather than general tax policy."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Amends Title 10 to adjust protections for communications by members of the Armed Forces—military personnel policy within the defense domain."}

{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Focuses on homeland security and critical infrastructure protection against electromagnetic (EMP) threats, which falls under national/homeland security rather than energy or technology regulation."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on comprehensive health insurance coverage and improving health care delivery, which falls under Health."}
{"policy_number":18,"reasoning":"Focuses on foreign policy sanctions and their enforcement against North Korea, which falls under international affairs."}

{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Amends a federal education program (Safe and Drug-Free Schools and Communities Act) to add bullying/harassment prevention in schools—primarily an education policy change."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Suspension of import duties is a tariff/foreign trade policy action."}
{"policy_number":13,"reasoning":"Expands administration of rental assistance within the Continuum of Care homeless assistance program; core focus is housing and homelessness policy."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Amends the Internal Revenue Code to change tax rates on repatriated foreign earnings; taxation policy falls under Macroeconomics."}
{"policy_number":7,"reasoning":"Regulates water pollution from commercial vessels under the Clean Water Act; primary focus is environmental protection and pollution control."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on Department of Defense cyber and IT ranges/facilities management, making defense the primary policy area."}
{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary aim is to increase geothermal energy production, which falls under energy policy."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Suspending import duties is a tariff policy action, which falls under foreign trade."}
{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Reauthorizes an education funding program (Impact Aid) under the Elementary and Secondary Education Act, making Education the primary focus."}

{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Juvenile mentoring grants are typically aimed at juvenile justice/delinquency prevention and youth at risk, which falls under Law, crime, and family issues (juvenile justice)."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill concerns medical research on asthma under the Public Health Service Act, making Health the primary policy area."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Amends the Controlled Substances Act to address controlled substance analogues, which is a criminal drug control/enforcement issue under law and crime."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Focuses on security upgrades at military (Armed Forces) recruitment centers, which falls under defense policy and military infrastructure."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill’s core purpose is to establish a VA-based national center and advisory board focused on research, diagnosis, and treatment of health conditions (including transgenerational effects) related to toxic exposure—primarily a health/medical research and care issue."}

{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Sets federal court jurisdiction to allow civil claims against railroads for Holocaust deportations; primary focus is courts/civil justice and litigation, which falls under Law, crime, and family issues."}
{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"Designates a new National Historic Site, an action concerning National Park Service/public land management."}
{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"Focuses on access and opportunities for outdoor recreation (hunting, fishing, shooting), typically involving management and use of public lands and waters."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Changes to the tax code (child tax credit) are primarily tax policy, which falls under Macroeconomics."}
{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Creates a teacher pipeline program within the Elementary and Secondary Education Act (K-12), which is an education policy issue."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill regulates Medicare providers by setting nurse staffing levels for patient safety, which is primarily a health care policy issue."}

{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"The bill mandates the Secretary of Defense to implement mental health screenings for service members related to deployments, a military readiness and personnel health issue within the Department of Defense; thus Defense is the primary topic."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Amends the FDA’s Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act to regulate antibiotic use and preserve effectiveness—primarily a health/pharmaceutical regulation and public health issue."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Establishes eligibility for Veterans Affairs benefits by recognizing Cadet Nurse Corps service as active military service; veterans’ benefits fall under Defense."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"PACE is a health care delivery program for the elderly within Medicare/Medicaid; the bill adjusts waiver authority for this health program, making Health the primary policy area."}
{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"Reauthorizes a National Heritage/parks partnership—an issue of public lands and heritage area management, not agricultural production policy."}

{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Concerns consumer credit reporting and regulation of credit information by utilities under the Fair Credit Reporting Act, which falls under banking/finance and consumer protection."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Reauthorizes trauma care programs under the Public Health Service Act, which is a health policy issue."}
{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"The bill concerns federal recognition of a Native American tribe, which falls under Indian affairs, categorized in CAP under Public lands and water management."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Amends Truth in Lending Act regarding mortgage originator compensation—consumer finance/credit regulation falls under Banking, finance, domestic commerce."}
{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"Addresses coordination of petroleum refinery outages to enhance energy supply reliability, which falls under energy policy."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Designates the name of a federal building/courthouse, which is a government operations action."}

{"policy_number":12,"reasoning":"Authorizes federal assistance for state adult protective services under the Older Americans Act, focusing on social services for vulnerable older adults—best aligned with Social Welfare."}
{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Focuses on promoting STEM education participation among students, particularly underrepresented groups, which is primarily an education policy issue."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Concerns gun rights/regulation (Second Amendment) in D.C., which falls under Law, crime, and family issues."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill targets family planning service programs (e.g., Title X) and imposes requirements on the information they provide, which falls under health and reproductive health services. While it references adoption, the policy lever is within family planning/health services, so Health (3) is the best fit."}
{"policy_number":12,"reasoning":"The bill’s main purpose is to change eligibility for Social Security benefits, which falls under Social welfare (Social Security policy)."}

{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Social and emotional learning (SEL) is primarily an education initiative involving school-based curricula and programs; the bill aims to support evidence-based SEL programming in educational settings."}
{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Concerns education funding and school choice (portability of federal funds for disadvantaged students), which is primarily an Education policy."}

{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"The bill directs the CFTC to impose position limits and margin requirements to curb excessive speculation in oil markets—an action focused on financial market regulation and commodities trading oversight, which falls under banking/finance and domestic commerce rather than energy production or policy."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Establishes a regulatory approval pathway for antibacterial drugs—an FDA/medical regulation issue squarely within health policy."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"The bill primarily addresses rules and benefits for Members of Congress—restricting their participation in the Federal Employees Health Benefits plan—contingent on external events. This focuses on congressional benefits/government operations rather than broader health policy."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on healthcare practices for treating neonatal abstinence syndrome and dissemination of medical best practices, which falls under Health."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"The bill amends the Stafford Act to enhance FEMA mitigation programs by incentivizing state building code adoption/enforcement—core to emergency management and disaster mitigation under Government Operations."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Extends a temporary suspension of import duties on a specific fiber product, which is a tariff/trade measure—fits Foreign trade."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Focuses on Medicare and public health/disease prevention (diabetes) — core Health policy."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary aim is to facilitate veterans’ access to VA health care by providing childcare support at VA facilities, making it chiefly a health policy issue."}
{"policy_number":16,"reasoning":"The bill concerns cybersecurity—developing standards to measure cyber attacks—an issue within technology and communications policy."}

{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Reauthorizes DOJ programs under the Debbie Smith Act focused on DNA evidence processing and sexual assault kit backlogs—core criminal justice/law enforcement policy."}

{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"The bill targets a military survivor annuity policy under Title 10 (Survivor Benefit Plan and DIC offset), which is a defense-related personnel/benefits issue; primary focus is Defense."}

{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"The bill’s core purpose is to facilitate enforcement and recovery of child support (family maintenance), including international cooperation via the Hague Convention. Child support and related enforcement are family law issues, which fall under Law, crime, family issues (11)."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary aim is to change budget enforcement (sequestration) by exempting certain programs, which is a fiscal/budget process issue under Macroeconomics."}

{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Reauthorizes and enhances the Small Business Innovation Research/Technology Transfer programs under the Small Business Act—primarily a small business/domestic commerce policy area."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Reduces an import tariff (“duty”) on certain electric motors, which is a foreign trade policy action involving customs duties."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Primary aim is to increase law enforcement presence for school safety; the tax mechanism is secondary to a law enforcement/public safety objective."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Suspending an import duty is a change to tariff policy, which falls under foreign trade."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Creates an advisory committee to review regulations—primarily about regulatory/administrative process and government oversight, which fits Government operations."}
{"policy_number":9,"reasoning":"The bill targets immigration-related fraud and sets punishments, which falls under immigration policy and enforcement."}

{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"The bill authorizes the Department of Education to fund full-service community schools; while such schools integrate services, the primary focus is education policy and school support."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Focuses on maritime security and combating piracy on international waters, a defense/national security issue typically addressed via naval operations."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Regulates firearms (silencers/suppressors) classification—gun policy falls under law and crime."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Modifies patent procedures/USPTO program (intellectual property), which falls under domestic commerce and regulation."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Expands Medicare coverage for medical nutrition therapy to prevent diabetes—healthcare coverage and disease prevention fall under Health."}
{"policy_number":18,"reasoning":"Authorizes foreign aid (microenterprise assistance) for renewable energy projects in developing countries; the core focus is international development assistance."}

{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Focus is on national manufacturing/industrial policy and strategy, which falls under domestic commerce and industry rather than macroeconomics or government operations."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Allows broadcast access to Supreme Court proceedings—an open government/transparency measure about operations of a federal branch."}

{"policy_number":18,"reasoning":"The bill addresses violence against women in an international context, implying U.S. foreign policy and/or foreign aid programs focused on global gender-based violence, which fits International affairs/foreign aid."}
{"policy_number":10,"reasoning":"Targets Federal Highway Administration emergency relief funds for disaster-related highway needs; primary policy area is transportation infrastructure."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary aim is to expand the healthcare workforce (orthotics and prosthetics) via grants, a health services capacity issue. Though it involves degree programs, the focus is on health professional training for care delivery, fitting Health (3)."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Addresses eating disorders within the Public Health Service Act, focusing on health/mental health policy."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Adjusts federal excise tax rates in the Internal Revenue Code—taxation policy falls under Macroeconomics."}

{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"The bill concerns taking land and mineral rights into trust by the Department of the Interior for a tribe—an action centered on federal/tribal land management. This fits Public lands and water management."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Amends Medicare (Title XVIII) rules on physician supervision in hospital outpatient therapeutic services—healthcare regulation."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Funds and authorizes U.S. intelligence and intelligence-related activities, which fall under national defense/security."}
{"policy_number":5,"reasoning":"Extends unemployment benefits, which falls under labor and employment policy."}

{"policy_number":16,"reasoning":"The bill regulates telecommunications contracts by banning mandatory arbitration in mobile service agreements, a communications/telecom consumer protection issue best classified under Space, technology, communications."}

{"policy_number":13,"reasoning":"Although it amends the tax code, the primary purpose is to encourage rehabilitation of older buildings and residences, which is a community development and housing objective."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Extends a suspension of import duty (tariff) on a product; tariff policy falls under Foreign trade."}

{"policy_number":7,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on reducing water pollution in the Chesapeake Bay watershed and verifying pollution reductions, which falls under environmental protection and pollution control."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Amends the Affordable Care Act’s coverage requirements to add conscience protections—primarily a health insurance/health policy issue."}
{"policy_number":4,"reasoning":"Extends agricultural disaster assistance programs under the Federal Crop Insurance Act; primary focus is agriculture policy."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"This bill modifies the federal tax code to extend a tax deduction; taxation and fiscal policy fall under Macroeconomics."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Amends the Internal Revenue Code to address tax avoidance; tax policy is classified under Macroeconomics."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"The bill modifies U.S. trade negotiating objectives to address conduct limiting commercial relations with Israel, which falls under foreign trade policy."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Suspends an import duty (tariff) on a specific chemical product, which is a foreign trade policy action."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Medicaid coverage policy for children is a health insurance/healthcare access issue, fitting under Health."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Designating the name of a federal building is an administrative/government operations action."}
{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"Expanding the biofuels market is an energy policy issue focused on fuel production and renewables."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Adjusts financial regulatory requirements (Dodd-Frank) for banks/credit unions; primary focus is banking and finance regulation."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Extends authorization for a law enforcement grant program for bulletproof vests under a crime control statute; primary focus is criminal justice/public safety."}

{"policy_number":12,"reasoning":"Adjusts resource rules under the Supplemental Security Income (SSI) program, a means-tested social welfare benefit, to exclude certain funeral/burial arrangements; primary focus is social welfare policy."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Suspends an import duty (tariff) on a product, which is a foreign trade policy action."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill targets health and medical malpractice insurance markets by applying antitrust laws to those insurers; its primary policy focus is regulation of health insurance, which falls under Health."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary aim is a prescription drug take-back program, which is a health policy intervention related to pharmaceuticals and public health, even though the target population is service members and veterans."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Modifies the federal tax code to change the standard deduction for seniors; taxation and fiscal policy fall under Macroeconomics."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"The bill concerns congressional representation and political status of D.C., altering the structure of representation in Congress—an issue of elections/government structure—fitting Government operations (Topic 19)."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"It concerns tariff/treatment preferences for imports from Nepal, which is a foreign trade policy action."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Concerns federal public debt, debt limit, and monetary authority (Fed) holdings—core macroeconomic/fiscal policy."}

{"policy_number":5,"reasoning":"Focuses on worker safety/health in the workplace and processing of labor-related benefits (Black Lung Benefits Act), which fall under labor and employment (OSHA/worker compensation)."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Focuses on Treasury’s administration of the Small Business Lending Fund, a financial program related to banking/finance and domestic commerce."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Adjusts eligibility for reserve component retired pay under Title 10—military personnel benefits/retirement policy falls under Defense."}

{"policy_number":4,"reasoning":"The bill targets child nutrition programs (school lunch/breakfast, Special Milk Program), which CAP codes under Agriculture, including food and nutrition assistance programs."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Amends the Tariff Act regarding customs-related smuggling provisions; tariffs and customs enforcement fall under foreign trade."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"The bill concerns FEMA’s guidance and coordination for emergency preparedness in schools, which falls under domestic homeland security and emergency management—core elements of Government Operations (Topic 19), rather than education policy itself."}
{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"Expands a national monument and manages federal public lands (National Landscape Conservation System), which falls under public lands and water management."}
{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on higher education financing by making employer-provided student loan assistance tax-exempt, which is primarily an education/student aid issue."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Addresses election administration by reducing voting lines and enabling online voter registration, which falls under government operations (elections)."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on FDA regulation of drugs and devices, user fee policies, and establishing a Center for Postmarket Drug Safety—core health policy and drug safety oversight under the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act."}

{"policy_number":10,"reasoning":"Concerns Transportation Worker Identification Credentials for maritime workers and timing relative to electronic readers—transportation security/regulation within the transportation sector."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill concerns health care workforce loan repayment programs under the Public Health Service Act, which falls under health policy."}
{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Focuses on school lunch facilities and training school food service staff—core components of K-12 education operations/child nutrition programs."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Reforms military justice procedures under Title 10 for members of the Armed Forces, which falls squarely under Defense policy."}
{"policy_number":18,"reasoning":"Reauthorizes a State Department public diplomacy advisory commission—an international affairs function—so the primary focus is foreign affairs."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"Suspending an import duty is a tariff policy action, which falls under foreign trade."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"The bill targets internal federal agency fleet management and adoption of ride-sharing within government operations, which fits Government operations (19), not general transportation policy."}

{"policy_number":18,"reasoning":"Authorizes appropriations for assistance to domestic and foreign programs for torture victims—a human rights and foreign aid focus, typically under international affairs (e.g., USAID, UN funds)."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary focus is expanding and improving the health care system, which falls under Health."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Amends FDA drug review incentive programs (priority review vouchers) for diseases; this is health regulation and pharmaceuticals, which falls under Health."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Amends the Arms Export Control Act regarding import authorization of defense-related firearms; AECA/defense trade controls fall under Defense policy."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill targets implementation of the Affordable Care Act and related health provisions, making health policy its primary focus."}

{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Sequestration is a federal budget enforcement mechanism; exempting certain payments from it is a budget process change, falling under macroeconomics/public budget policy."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"The bill suspends an import duty (tariff) on certain sports footwear, which is a foreign trade/tariff policy issue."}

{"policy_number":13,"reasoning":"Focuses on housing development by ensuring credit/liquidity for home builders; primary policy area is housing/community development rather than general banking regulation."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"The bill concerns awarding a military honor (Medal of Honor) to a U.S. Army Air Forces servicemember; military personnel and honors fall under Defense."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Establishes a federal bank focused on financing employee ownership; core focus is banking/finance and domestic commerce rather than labor standards."}

{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"Creates a DOE pilot program providing grants/loan guarantees to hospitals to reduce energy costs and increase energy resilience—primarily an energy policy initiative."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Admitting a new state (New Columbia/DC statehood) concerns the structure and operations of the U.S. federal system and intergovernmental arrangements, which falls under Government operations."}

{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Amends FISA to reform access to business records for foreign intelligence and terrorism investigations—an intelligence/national security matter, which falls under Defense."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on whistleblower protections and oversight for federal contractors within intelligence agencies, which falls under government operations (civil service/ethics/oversight), not defense policy itself."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Changes vesting rules for Members’ pensions under the Federal Employees Retirement System—an internal federal personnel/benefits matter under government operations."}

{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"Concerns Department of the Interior authority over taking land into trust for Indian tribes—an Indian/public land management issue under Public lands and water management."}
{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"The bill centers on renewable energy (marine and hydrokinetic) research and development, which falls under Energy."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Authorizes a Congressional Gold Medal—an honorary, commemorative action handled under government operations and congressional affairs."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Expands Coast Guard authority to lease federal tidelands/submerged lands under its control—primarily a government property/asset management issue, fitting Government operations."}

{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"Amends the Higher Education Act regarding student loan disclosure requirements—this is higher education policy and student financial aid, which falls under Education."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Focuses on crime prevention and community violence reduction via DOJ grants, which falls under Law, crime, and family issues."}
{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"The bill concerns recreational access rules within national parks and a national wildlife refuge, which falls under management and use of public lands and waters."}

{"policy_number":16,"reasoning":"The bill regulates data security and breach notification for entities handling personal information—an information technology/communications privacy and cybersecurity issue best aligned with Space, technology, communications (Topic 16)."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Expands Medicare (Title XVIII) coverage for a medical service (custom breast prostheses) post-mastectomy; primary focus is health care coverage."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"The bill changes import tariffs by suspending a duty on an imported product, which falls under foreign trade policy."}

{"policy_number":5,"reasoning":"This bill modifies the WARN Act to require notice related to offshoring, focusing on worker protections and employment practices, which falls under Labor and employment."}
{"policy_number":9,"reasoning":"Creates a new nonimmigrant visa category for STEM students and provides a pathway to permanent residency based on employment—core immigration policy."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Targets the National Flood Insurance Program reforms (insurance policy). Insurance is coded under Banking, finance, domestic commerce."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Focuses on setting standards for how federal agencies handle and use scientific information—an internal government process/regulatory and administrative governance issue."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Promotes adoption of electronic health record technology by healthcare providers; primary focus is health policy and healthcare delivery."}

{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary focus is abortion policy (prohibiting abortion-related discrimination), which CAP classifies under Law, crime, and family issues (family/abortion)."}

{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Targets government personnel rules and congressional pensions (Title 5), denying retirement credit for Members convicted of felonies—an internal government operations/ethics measure."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Alters federal criminal sentencing (death penalty aggravating factors) under Title 18, which is squarely within law and crime policy."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Names a federal courthouse (public building), which falls under government operations and public property matters."}

{"policy_number":20,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on managing forests and prioritizing restoration work—activities tied to federal land and resource management—best classified under Public lands and water management."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill addresses improving diagnosis and treatment for a specific medical condition under the Public Health Service Act, which is a health policy matter."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"Focuses on child nutrition, wellness policies, and healthy school foods under the School Lunch Act—primarily a public health/nutrition initiative."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"The bill centers on easing regulations for lending institutions, which falls under banking and financial regulatory policy."}

{"policy_number":6,"reasoning":"The bill modifies eligibility for student loan forgiveness under the Higher Education Act, a higher education/student loans issue. The farm/ranch aspect is incidental to redefining public service for PSLF, so Education (topic 6) is primary."}

{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Reauthorizes the federal terrorism risk insurance backstop, an insurance/finance program governing private insurance markets—fits Banking, finance, domestic commerce."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"The bill changes eligibility for a federal tax credit (EITC) in the Internal Revenue Code, which falls under taxation and budget policy—Macroeconomics."}

{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"The bill regulates offshore oil production and transport (pipeline requirement) and distribution of OCS oil and gas revenues—core energy extraction and policy issues."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Sets eligibility rules for federal employment (civil service/personnel standards), which falls under Government operations."}

{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary purpose is sexual assault prevention and response (training, protocols, victim advocates, advisory council), which falls under law/crime and victim support rather than general foreign aid operations."}
{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill focuses on improving preventive health care by training rural health care practitioners, which squarely falls under Health."}

{"policy_number":16,"reasoning":"Adjusts cost-share rules for the NIST Hollings Manufacturing Extension Partnership, a federal technology/innovation support program—fits Space, technology, communications."}

{"policy_number":10,"reasoning":"Title 23 concerns highways/transportation; the bill changes the funding status for a highway program (23 USC §140). Despite §140 relating to EEO/training, the primary focus is transportation program funding, so Transportation (10) fits best."}
{"policy_number":19,"reasoning":"Reforms to public financing for presidential elections pertain to campaign finance and election administration, which fall under Government operations."}
{"policy_number":11,"reasoning":"Witness protection and assistance programs are part of the criminal justice system and law enforcement; funding them via DOJ grants is primarily a law/crime policy."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Sets a national usury (interest) rate for consumer credit under the Truth in Lending Act, which is consumer finance regulation."}
{"policy_number":17,"reasoning":"The bill changes an import duty (tariff) on a specific product, which falls under foreign trade policy."}
{"policy_number":5,"reasoning":"Creates a workforce training subsidy under the Workforce Investment Act, which focuses on employment and job training programs — a Labor and Employment issue."}
{"policy_number":5,"reasoning":"MyRA accounts are retirement savings vehicles; policy focus is on private pensions/retirement, which falls under Labor and employment."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Clarifies who qualifies as a veteran based on attendance at a service academy preparatory school; veterans and military personnel issues fall under Defense."}
{"policy_number":15,"reasoning":"Focus is on veterans’ benefits (disabled veterans), which falls under defense/veterans affairs."}
{"policy_number":1,"reasoning":"Amends the Internal Revenue Code to change asset depreciation (recovery period) for race horses—this is a tax policy change under macroeconomic/fiscal policy."}
{"policy_number":10,"reasoning":"Focuses on safety and security standards for passenger vessels, a transportation policy area (maritime)."}

{"policy_number":18,"reasoning":"Focuses on prioritizing anti-human trafficking efforts within the U.S. Department of State, aligning with foreign policy and international human rights functions—best fit is International affairs/foreign aid."}
{"policy_number":14,"reasoning":"Focuses on FDIC’s Systemic Resolution Fund and banking/financial regulatory mechanisms, which falls under banking and finance."}
{"policy_number":8,"reasoning":"The bill targets the renewable fuel program and ethanol blend limits in gasoline—issues central to energy/fuels policy rather than general environmental protection."}
{"policy_number":10,"reasoning":"The bill concerns governance and appointment authority for the board of a regional transit authority (WMATA), falling under transportation policy."}
{"policy_number":4,"reasoning":"Reforms the federal sugar program, which is an agricultural commodity policy area under USDA; primary focus is agriculture."}

{"policy_number":3,"reasoning":"The bill’s primary purpose is to extend/modify a tax credit to help individuals afford health insurance, making health policy (insurance coverage/affordability) the central focus rather than general tax policy."}
